title: Michael #3413
definition:
Michael = "who is like God"

 1) the first of the chief princes or archangels who is supposed to be
    the guardian angel of the Israelites
nasbUsage:
Definition: Michael = "who is like God"

 1) the first of the chief princes or archangels who is supposed to be
    the guardian angel of the Israelites

    NASB:  Michael, the archangel:
